notes: Recognisably the same loligo with correct horizontal pose, fin shape and the distinctive curled-up and trailing-down tentacle pair, but interior detail is sparse and the arm crown reads as a lobed blob rather than discrete arms.
specific_issues: arm crown rendered as fused lobes instead of 8 distinct arms
stipple is scattered noise rather than concentrated chromatophore fields matching the photo's dorsal/lateral shading
eye is present but very small and lacks the almond outline typical of FAO plates
sucker rings only appear on the two long tentacles; arms show no suckers
a couple of stray short line segments near the head read as artefacts
fin-mantle junction is a single contour with no internal anatomical line separating fin from mantle
